calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Invalidate The Williams Family Trust Of Betty Yvonne Williams And Leroy Williams And To Remove The Appointed Trustee, Shawny K. Willimas Under Unde Influence And Perjury And Appoint Pltf As New Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Graham Douds appeared via zoom for Shawny Williams.

The Court dismissed the Petition, parties did not give proper notice.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cece. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Invalidate The Williams Family Trust Of Betty Yvonne Williams And Leroy Williams And To Remove The Appointed Trustee, Shawny K. Willimas Under Unde Influence And Perjury And Appoint Pltf As New Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Continued To Apr-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shanda Love, petitioner in pro per (via Zoom).
Shannon Williams, interested party (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the Petition for Order to Invalidate the Williams Family Trust and to Remove the Appointed Trustee and Appoint a Successor Trustee.

The Court noted that the petition had not been properly served and that no proof of service was on file. The Court stated that service by email was not authorized and directed petitioner to properly serve the petition.

The Court continued the matter to April 1, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow for proper service, and stated that if the petition is not properly served by the continued hearing date, the matter may be ordered off calendar.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order To Invalidate Teh Williams Family Trust Of Betty Yvonne Williams And Leroy Williams And To Remove The Appointed Trustee, Shawny K.
Off Calendar May-28-2024 Continued To Aug-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Graham Douds appeared by zoom for Shawny Williams (respondent/trustee).
Shanda Love appeared by courtcall in propria persona.

Mr. Douds stated that he believes this matter is subject to summary judgment, that a hearing on his motion for summary judgment is set for August 1, 2024, that if his motion is granted this will all go away, that the beneficiary path has expired and suggested continuing the matter. The court stated that there are a number of issues raised with respect to Mrs. Love's petition and that if she wants to continue with it, she will need to fix the defects. Mrs. Love stated that she fixed them. Mr. Douds stated that there have been no subsequent filings and that there is no amended petition. Discussion was held regarding the first cause of action having been dismissed. The court explained Mr. Douds position to Mrs. Love. The Petition for Order to Invalidate The Williams Family Trust, etc. is continued to August 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The parties waive notice of the continued hearing.

Judge: Roger T. Picquet. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Order To Invalidate Teh Williams Family Trust Of Betty Yvonne Williams And Leroy Williams And To Remove The Appointed Trustee, Shawny K.
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Continued To May-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Shanda Love, via CourtCall, in propria persona, Petitioner.
Shannon Badwick, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Shawny Williams, Trustee.

The court at the outset acknowledges Ms. Love's response to the Order to Show Cause. The Order to Show Cause is taken off calendar in open court. Ms. Love is reminded that the court does not notify petitioners of their hearing dates, and that it is her obligation to monitor the progress of this matter. Ms. Love is then advised that she needs to file an amended petition as the first cause of action has been dismissed, and the procedural issues sent to her on Oct-27-2023, have still not been cleared. The court advises that it intends to continue the subject matter to allow Petitioner to address the procedural issues as indicated but if substantial progress is not made by the next hearing date, the court will consider taking her petition off calendar. No objections to the court's intention are presented.

The subject Petition is continued to May-28-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Jaime. Not Reported.

Petition For Order To Invalidate Teh Williams Family Trust Of Betty Yvonne Williams And Leroy Williams And To Remove The Appointed Trustee, Shawny K.
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Continued To Apr-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Graham Douds appeared by zoom for Shawny Williams (respondent).

Mr. Douds stated that he has not heard from Mrs. Love since the hearing on the demurrer. The court noted that Mrs. Love has not amended her petition as ordered and granted the request for dismissal of the first cause of action of fraud. Discussion was held regarding the issue of a motion for summary judgment being filed. The Petition to Invalidate the Williams Family Trust is continued to April 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will also be issued to the Shanda Love to appear on April 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear at today's hearing.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Respondent Shawny Williams To Shanda Loves Petition For Order To Inv Alida Te The Williams Family Trust Of Betty Yvonne Williams And Leroy Williams And To Remove The Appointed Trustee, Sha Wny K. Williams Under Conspiracy, Fraud, Duress, Undue Influence, Altering Of A Will Under An Affidavit Of Death And Appoint Plaintiff As New Trustee Pursuant To California Probate Code Section, 15642, 15643, 17200 California Welfare Institutions Code 15610.70
Off Calendar Dec-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Graham Douds appeared by zoom for Shawny Williams (respondent).
Shanda Love appeared by zoom in propria persona.
Shannon Williams appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Douds stated that there is no allegation in the pleading as to when the notice of trust was sent, cited Cansino v Bank of America, 224 Cal.App 4th 1462 and raised the issue of the court taking judicial notice of the loan documents. The court explained the demurrer process to Mrs. Love and informed her that she needs to present sufficient facts to allege fraud. Mr. Douds stated that the tentative ruling did not address further grounds of demurrer on the 2nd, 3rd and 4th causes of action. The demurrer is under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
